name: Papaya Habanero Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Ripe papaya pulp (skin & seeds removed)
1/8 tsp Fresh ground Jamaican Allspice (coarsely ground)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last 5 in a food processor and process until well-blended while retaining texture.
2. Place the mixture in a saucepan with 1 1/2 cups water over medium-high heat.
3. Mix the remaining 1/2 cup of water with cornstarch separately.
4. Add cinnamon and brown sugar as it begins to boil, stirring frequently.
5. When it comes to a simmer, add the cornstarch mixture, stirring first.
6. Cook on low boil for 7 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Set aside overnight. This freezes indefinitely and keeps in the refrigerator for up to 6 weeks.
